$comment: Soft caps on tokens per agent for this fixture. CI tracks regressions but doesn't fail on overrun by default — these are signals, not gates. If a budget is exceeded by >2x consistently across 3 runs, investigate.

orchestrator.$note: Tiny mode skips the slicer + verifier and runs a single Opus pass; the orchestrator's working state should stay small.

single-opus-pass.$note: The fixture is one file, ~12 LOC changed. A single Opus pass with reviewer prompts inlined should fit comfortably here.

merger.$note: Validates the 2 findings against the schema, partitions, annotates sensitivity. Should be tiny.
